Title: Large Language Models (LLMs) Resources

Here are some sample links to popular Large Language Models and related resources:

1. OpenAI GPT Series: https://openai.com/gpt/
2. Hugging Face Models: https://huggingface.co/models
3. Google's Bard (now Gemini): https://bard.google.com/
4. Anthropic Claude: https://www.anthropic.com/claude
5. Meta Llama: https://ai.meta.com/llama/
6. Cohere Command: https://cohere.com/command
7. Stability AI Stable Diffusion (for text-to-image): https://stability.ai/

For more information, visit the official documentation of each provider.
